title: Eva Fix: Abnormals in Dairy Life
display_title: Eva Fix: Abnormals in Dairy Life
wikitext:
[[Image:Fix 01.jpg|thumb|The cover to the book.]]
'''Eva Fix: Abnormals in Dairy Life''' is an unofficial art book produced by Chocolate Shop in 1997.  This 52 page book included many new designs for all the Evas therefor eliminating the [[Mass Production Evangelions]]. The book shows drawings of the first four children with injuries taken throughout the show.  It also includes character designs for pilots up to the 13th child.  The drawings are all very detailed and many are in color.
[[Image:Fix 04-05.jpg|thumb|Eva-11 Cannon Type and Pilot.]]
[[Category:A to Z]]
[[Category:Doujinshi]]

{{Template:Stub}}

This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!
